process_cards.business_purpose: Confirm the date, platform-store scope, and target report template before data collection starts.
process_cards.operation_summary: Load the fixed platform-store list, date scope, and report template configuration.
prework_dependencies: Confirm the platform-store list is fixed and complete.

process_cards.business_purpose: Prepare access to each e-commerce platform backend.
process_cards.operation_summary: Open or connect to each platform backend using the configured account access method.
prework_dependencies: Confirm the login method for each platform account is stable and reusable.

process_cards.business_purpose: Get the daily operating metrics for each platform and fixed store.
process_cards.operation_summary: Enter each platform backend and query or download the daily data under fixed conditions.

process_cards.business_purpose: Convert platform data into the same report field structure.
process_cards.operation_summary: Map platform fields to report fields and calculate the values needed for the daily report.
prework_dependencies: Confirm the metric mapping between platform fields and the report template is complete.

process_cards.business_purpose: Write normalized daily data into the fixed Tencent Docs report template.
process_cards.operation_summary: Open the target Tencent Docs template and write each platform-store metric into the configured position.
prework_dependencies: Confirm the Tencent Docs template location and edit permissions.

process_cards.business_purpose: Preserve evidence for whether the report was generated correctly.
process_cards.operation_summary: Record source value, written value, processing time, and abnormal items for later review.
prework_dependencies: Confirm the minimum result validation method.

cross_step_dependencies: Platform-store list must be fixed and complete.
Metric-to-template mapping must be confirmed before normalization.
Date scope must be agreed before collection.
Stable login strategy is required for platform collection.
Result log must preserve source values and written values.

notes: Design login, missing data, template change, write failure, and source-write mismatch branches.
